INDICATOR_NAME: Labor force participation rate, female (% of female population ages 15+) (modeled ILO estimate)
SOURCE_NOTE: The labor force participation rate is the labor force as a percent of the population ages 15 and older. The labor force is the sum of all persons of working age who are employed and those who are unemployed.
SOURCE_ORGANIZATION: ILO Modelled Estimates database (ILOEST), International Labour Organization (ILO), uri: https://ilostat.ilo.org/data/bulk/, publisher: ILOSTAT, type: external database, date accessed: January 07, 2025
